info.title: IndiaForums API
info.description: API for IndiaForums - India's premier entertainment community platform featuring forums, fan fiction, quizzes, and more.

post.summary: Register a new user with username and password
post.description: Creates a new user account and returns JWT access token and refresh token. Rate limited to prevent abuse (10 attempts per 15 minutes).
Authenticates a user and returns JWT access token and refresh token. Rate limited to prevent brute force (10 attempts per 15 minutes).

post.summary: Login or register with external provider (Google, Facebook, Microsoft)
post.description: Authenticates a user via external provider. If user doesn't exist, creates a new account automatically. Rate limited (10 attempts per 15 minutes).

post.summary: Refresh access token using refresh token
post.description: Generates a new access token and refresh token using a valid refresh token. Rate limited (10 attempts per 15 minutes).
Revokes the refresh token to invalidate future token refresh requests.
Generates a password reset token and sends it via email. Requires captcha validation.
Resets user password using the token received via email.

get.description: Validates if a username is available for registration. Returns suggestions if taken. Used for real-time form validation.
Validates if an email is available for registration. Used for real-time form validation.

post.summary: Resend email verification or update email
post.description: Sends verification email to current email or updates email and sends verification.
Confirms user's email address using a verification token.

get.description: Returns email logs for the authenticated user showing verification email history.
Handles Google OAuth callback and returns JWT tokens
Handles Facebook OAuth callback and returns JWT tokens
Handles Microsoft OAuth callback and returns JWT tokens

Returns the lightweight hover-card data for a user: avatar, banner, online status, country flag, permission flags and navigation URLs. Anonymous access is supported; permission flags are populated only for authenticated requests.
Retrieves another user's profile with privacy checks. Returns activities based on mode (all, wall, scrapbook, slambook, testimonial).

get.summary: Get another user's activities with pagination
get.description: Retrieves paginated activities for another user with privacy checks. Supports modes: all, wall, scrapbook, slambook, testimonial.
Retrieves forum posts from another user with privacy and moderator checks. Supports filtering by forum and search query.

get.summary: Get another user's forum posts grouped by topic
get.description: Retrieves forum topics where another user has posted, ordered by TopicId with privacy and moderator checks. Supports filtering by forum and search query.
Retrieves comments posted by another user with privacy and moderator checks. Supports sorting by newest, oldest, popular (by likes), or discussed (by replies).

Retrieves buddy list for another user with privacy and moderator checks. Supports two modes:
- bl: Buddy List (friends) - supports optional username search
- mbl: Mutual Buddy List (friends in common with the logged-in user)
Retrieves favourite movies for another user with privacy and moderator checks.
Retrieves favourite shows for another user with privacy and moderator checks.
Retrieves favourite celebrities for another user with privacy and moderator checks.
Retrieves favourite forums for another user with privacy and moderator checks.
Retrieves fanfiction followers for another user with privacy and moderator checks.

get.summary: Get another user's username change log
get.description: Retrieves the username change log for another user with privacy checks.
Retrieves the badges for another user with privacy checks.
Retrieves the details of a specific badge for another user with privacy checks.
Returns the authenticated user's account status (active, hibernated, etc.).

put.description: Allows user to hibernate (lock) or activate their account. Status 1=Active, 4=Hibernated. Users with status 2 (banned) or 3 (suspended) cannot change status.

get.summary: Get user activities (profile feed, wall, scrapbook, slambook, testimonial)
get.description: Retrieves activities for the authenticated user based on mode: all, wall, scrapbook, slambook, testimonial, or feed (timeline).

post.summary: Create a new activity post on a user's wall
post.description: Posts a new activity on the specified user's wall. Authenticated users can post on their own or others' walls (subject to privacy settings).

get.summary: Get activities for a specific user
get.description: Retrieves activities for a specific user. Can be called by any authenticated user to view another user's public activities.

post.summary: Post activity on another user's wall (Scrapbook/Slambook/Testimonial)

put.description: Updates an activity post. Only the creator can update their own posts. For Slambook, both the question asker and wall user can update their respective parts.

delete.description: Deletes an activity post. Only the creator or wall user can delete the post. Also updates related counts (Scrapbook/Slambook/Testimonial).

get.summary: Get user notifications with optional template filtering
get.description: Retrieves notifications for the authenticated user grouped by templates with pagination support.

get.summary: Get unread notification count for badge display
get.description: Returns a lightweight count of unread notifications for displaying badge counts on mobile apps.

get.summary: Get combined unread notifications and messages count
get.description: Returns the number of unread notifications and unread private messages for badge display on the bell and message icons.

post.description: Marks one or more notifications as read for the authenticated user. Accepts comma-separated notification IDs.

get.description: Returns inbox capacity, unread/starred/outbox counts, and folder list for the authenticated user.
Returns all private message folders for the authenticated user.

post.summary: Create or update a message folder
post.description: Create a new folder (folderId=0) or update an existing folder (folderId>0). Max 10 folders allowed, folder name max 10 characters.

get.description: Returns paginated user messages based on mode (Inbox, Outbox, Read, Unread) with optional filters for search, priority, and folder.

post.description: Creates and sends a new private message with comprehensive validation including recipient validation, spam limits, and blocking checks.

get.summary: Get message thread by root ID
get.description: Returns a paginated message thread with all messages in the conversation. Validates user access to the thread.
Returns a single broadcast message with related messages from the same sender. Marks message as read if in inbox mode.
Returns paginated list of user's message drafts with cursor-based pagination support.

get.summary: Get new message form initialization data
get.description: Returns form data for composing new messages, replies, forwards, or loading drafts.

post.summary: Opt out of a message reply chain
post.description: Removes the authenticated user from a message thread so they no longer receive replies.
Perform bulk actions (read, unread, delete, star, unstar) on multiple messages at once.
Move multiple messages to a specific folder or remove them from folders (folderId=0).

delete.description: Deletes a folder and moves all messages out of it (sets FolderId to 0).

post.summary: Send a friend request to another user
post.description: Sends a friend request to another user. Checks for block lockout period (24 hours after unblocking).

post.summary: Accept a friend request from another user
post.description: Accepts a pending friend request by updating the friend status in the database.
Cancels or rejects a pending friend request by removing it from the database.
Blocks or unblocks a user. Includes validation for non-ladder groups and 24-hour lockout period after unblocking.

get.description: Returns users eligible for general @-tagging, respecting AllowUserTags privacy setting.
Returns forum followers for @-tagging. Falls back to general user tags when ForumType != 1.
Returns moderator users for @-tagging. Requires moderator role.

get.summary: Get all active users for admin tagging
get.description: Returns all active users for @-tagging. Admin use only.
Returns users from the current user's PM inbox or outbox for @-tagging.

get.summary: Get buddy list users for tagging
get.description: Returns the current user's buddy list filtered by optional username prefix, plus exact username match.

get.summary: Get mixed entity tags (channels, movies, shows, persons)
get.description: Returns channels, movies, shows and persons matching the query prefix for @-tagging.
Returns genres matching the optional query prefix.
Returns FanFiction keyword tags matching the optional query prefix.
Returns categories matching the query prefix, formatted as Sub/Parent.
Returns persons/celebrities matching the query prefix.
Returns movies and shows matching the query prefix.
Returns channels matching the query prefix.

post.description: Registers a new device or updates an existing device token for push notifications (FCM/APNs).

delete.description: Unregisters a device (marks as inactive). Called on logout or app uninstall.

put.description: Updates notification preferences for a specific device (enable/disable notifications).

get.description: Returns all registered devices for the authenticated user.

Retrieves the authenticated user's complete profile including:
- Basic info (username, email, phone)
- Email confirmation status
- Profile settings (avatar, country, privacy)
- Forum signature
- Username change history
- Visit streak and comment count

put.description:
Updates the authenticated user's profile information including:
- Display name
- Bio/About
- Date of birth (DOB)
- Gender
- Forum signature
- Social media links (Facebook, Twitter, Youtube, Instagram)
- Pronouns

get.description:
Retrieves the authenticated user's notification and privacy preferences including:
- Email notification settings (18 different options)
- Visibility settings (profile sections, signature, country)
- Permission settings (privacy level, PM, user tags)

put.description:
Updates the authenticated user's notification and privacy preferences.
Allows granular control over:
- Email notifications (PM, replies, quotes, comments, badges, newsletters, digests)
- Profile visibility (scrapbook, slambook, testimonials, feeds, posts)
- Permissions (privacy level, allow PM, allow tags)

get.summary: Get badges for the authenticated user
get.description: Retrieves a list of badges earned by the authenticated user.

get.summary: Get badge details with earned levels
get.description: Retrieves badge details and the authenticated user's earned levels for that badge.

get.summary: Get buddy list for the authenticated user
get.description:
Retrieves buddy list based on mode:
- bl: Buddy List (friends)
- pl: Pending friend requests
- wl: Waiting list (friend requests sent)
- bll: Blocked list
- vl: Profile visitors

get.summary: Get comments by the authenticated user
get.description: Retrieves a list of comments posted by the user with various sorting options: newest (default), oldest, popular (by likes), discussed (by replies).

get.summary: Get favourite celebrities for the authenticated user
get.description: Retrieves a list of celebrities/persons the user has marked as favourites, ordered alphabetically by name.

get.summary: Get favourite forums for the authenticated user
get.description: Retrieves a list of forums the user is watching, along with invited and requested forums.

get.summary: Get favourite movies for the authenticated user
get.description: Retrieves a list of movies the user has marked as favourites, including ratings and year information.

get.summary: Get favourite shows for the authenticated user
get.description: Retrieves a list of TV shows the user has marked as favourites, ordered by when they were added.

get.summary: Get fanfiction followers for the authenticated user
get.description: Retrieves a list of users who follow the authenticated user's fanfiction works, including friend/follow status.

get.summary: Get fanfiction authors the authenticated user is following
get.description: Retrieves a list of fanfiction authors the user is following, including notification preferences.

get.summary: Get forum drafts for the authenticated user
get.description: Retrieves a list of forum post drafts saved by the user.

get.summary: Get topics where the authenticated user has posted
get.description: Retrieves a list of forum topics where the user has participated with optional filtering by forum and search query.

get.summary: Get topics where the authenticated user has posted, ordered by TopicId
get.description: Retrieves a list of forum topics where the user has participated with optional filtering by forum and search query, ordered by TopicId.

get.summary: Get topics the authenticated user is watching
get.description: Retrieves a list of forum topics the user has subscribed to for email notifications.

get.summary: Get warning details for the authenticated user
get.description: Retrieves the warning history for the authenticated user.
Returns the current user's username change history with eligibility status for next change (1 year rule).

put.description: Changes the authenticated user's username. Users can only change username once per year. Requires logout/login after change.

get.description: Retrieves username change history for the authenticated user or all users (if uid parameter is provided).

get.summary: Get forum home page with categories and forums
Get forum topics by forum ID
Get topic posts by topic ID
Get paged list of users who posted in a topic, ordered by post count
Get paged posts by a specific user within a topic

post.summary: Reply to an existing forum topic
Move a topic to a different forum
Merge a topic into another topic
Trash one or more topics (move to trash)
Restore a topic from trash to its original forum
Close a reported topic and update related reports
Trash a single forum post (move to trash topic)
Untrash a single forum post (restore from trash)
Move a single forum post to a different topic
Mark a forum post as matured or normal
Add or update a moderator note on a forum post

delete.summary: Delete a moderator note from a forum post

get.summary: Get reported topics for a forum
Get reported posts for a topic
Get IP address details: geo info, ban status, and users who posted from this IP

post.summary: Ban or unban an IP address (moderator-and-above rights required)
Ban or unban a forum user (moderator rights required: groups 1, 3, 16)

get.summary: Get topic detail, forum permissions, and flairs for the edit topic admin form
Get the list of teams for a forum with current-user membership info
Get the member list for a forum team

post.summary: Join (or switch to) a team within a forum

delete.summary: Opt out of the current user's team in a forum

post.summary: Update email notification frequency for a followed forum

post.description: Add, update, or remove emoji reactions on forum posts. Supports Like, Love, Wow, Lol, Shock, Sad, Angry reactions.

get.summary: Get likes for a specific thread
get.description: Returns a list of users who liked/reacted to the specified thread. Requires authentication.
Returns paginated list of articles. **Cached for 3 minutes**.

get.summary: Get complete article details with items and related articles (detailed)
get.description: Returns complete article with items and related articles. **Cached for 10 minutes**.

get.summary: Get complete article by ID with items and related articles
get.description: Returns complete article with items and related articles. **Cached for 10 minutes**.

get.summary: Get paginated comments for any content type
get.description: Returns comments for articles (contentTypeId=7) or media/photos (contentTypeId=6). Use cursor parameter for pagination.

post.description: Creates a new comment for articles, media, fan fictions, quizzes, or user feeds. Supports both authenticated and guest users.

get.summary: Get likes for a specific comment
get.description: Returns a list of users who liked/disliked the specified comment. Requires authentication.

put.description: Updates an existing comment. User must be authenticated and authorized (comment owner, moderator, or FFEditor for FanFiction).

delete.description: Soft deletes an existing comment with cascading to child comments. User must be authenticated and authorized (comment owner, moderator, Reporter, Editor, or FFEditor for FanFiction).

post.summary: Delete all guest comments and ban the guest
post.description: Deletes all comments from a guest user and bans them from posting. Requires moderator or higher permissions.
Creates, updates, or removes a like/dislike on a comment. User must be authenticated. Supports toggling existing likes.

post.summary: React to content with emoji reactions
post.description: Add emoji reactions to articles, media, fan fiction chapters, and other content types. Supports reactions: Awesome, Nice, Loved, Lol, Funny, Fail, Omg, Cry.
Submit a report for inappropriate content. Supports both authenticated and anonymous users.

get.description: Returns list of available report reasons (Fraud, Spam, Harassment, etc.)

get.summary: Get user's existing report for content
get.description: Returns the authenticated user's previous report for specific content (if exists)

post.description: Generates platform-specific share URLs (Facebook, Twitter, WhatsApp) for content. Returns full URL, short URL, and pre-formatted share links.
Logs when content is shared to track popular content and share sources. Used for analytics and viral content detection.

get.summary: Get complete photo details with related photos (detailed)
Get complete photo by ID with related photos

get.description: Returns paginated list of videos. **Cached for 3 minutes**.

get.summary: Get complete video details with related videos (detailed)
get.description: Returns complete video with related videos. **Cached for 10 minutes**.

get.summary: Get complete video by ID with related videos
get.description: Returns complete video with related videos. **Cached for 10 minutes**.

get.summary: Get complete media gallery details with related galleries (detailed)
Get complete media gallery by ID with related galleries

get.description: Returns paginated list of shorts, optionally filtered by parent category.
Returns paginated list of web stories based on query type and id.
Returns details for a specific web story.
Fetches trending or search results from Giphy API
Fetches random or search results from Unsplash API
Required by Unsplash API terms - tracks photo downloads
Fetches featured or search results from Tenor API
Fetches images from Pixabay API
Fetches videos from Pixabay API
Fetches photos from Pexels API

get.summary: Get photos from IndiaForums media library
get.description: Fetches photos from the internal IndiaForums media library
Fetches videos from Pexels API

post.summary: Upload a cropped image to temp folder
post.description:
Uploads a base64 encoded cropped image to temp folder. 
Converts image to JPEG format and stores for 24 hours.
Supports both authenticated and anonymous uploads.

**Restrictions:**
- GIF images are not allowed
- Animated WebP images are not allowed
- Maximum file size: 10 MB
- Temp files expire after 24 hours

Uploads user profile picture directly to permanent storage.
Converts to JPEG and validates format.
Leave imageData empty to remove existing thumbnail.

**Restrictions:**
- GIF images are not allowed
- Animated WebP images are not allowed
- Maximum file size: 10 MB

Uploads user cover photo directly to permanent storage.
Converts to JPEG and validates format.
Leave imageData empty to remove existing banner.

**Restrictions:**
- GIF images are not allowed
- Animated WebP images are not allowed
- Maximum file size: 10 MB

post.summary: Upload post image for forum replies/topics
post.description:
Uploads image for forum posts/replies.
Converts to WebP format with high quality (95).
Resizes to max 800x1200 if larger.
Creates UserMedia record and saves with user-specific naming.

**Restrictions:**
- GIF images are not allowed
- Animated WebP images are not allowed
- Maximum file size: 10 MB
- User groups 4 and 5 cannot upload images

get.description:
Retrieves a paginated list of movies by mode.
                Modes: 'latest' (released within last 2 days), 'upcoming' (to be released in future)

get.summary: Get movies by advanced mode (Person, PersonByRole, User, Category, Latest, Upcoming)
get.description:
Retrieves movies filtered by different modes with pagination.
                
                Modes:
                - Person (3): Movies associated with a person (all roles)
                - PersonByRole (30): Movies by person and specific role (actor, director, etc.)
                - User (51): User's favorite movies
                - Category (0): Movies in a specific category
                - Latest (100): Latest released movies
                - Upcoming (101): Upcoming movies

Retrieves a paginated list of movies for a specific year.
                Valid years: 1933 (first year of Indian cinema) to current year
Retrieves critic and user reviews for a specific movie.

post.description: Submits a user review for a specific movie. Requires authentication.

get.description: Retrieves movie details and story/plot information.
Retrieves cast and crew information for a specific movie.
Retrieves fanclub members for a specific movie with pagination.

put.description: Updates an existing movie review. User can only update their own reviews (or admin can update any).

delete.description: Deletes an existing movie review. User can only delete their own reviews (or admin can delete any).

get.description:
Retrieves a paginated list of TV shows.
                Supports optional category filtering.
                Shows are ordered by current week rank (descending).
                Default page size: 12 (matching legacy behavior).
                
                Category Examples:
                - No category: Returns all shows
                - CategoryId = 5: Returns shows from TV Shows parent category
                - Specific category: Returns shows from that category

Retrieves ChaskaMeter rankings for TV shows.
                ChaskaMeter is a comprehensive rating system that combines:
                - Buzz: Social media and online buzz score
                - Rating: Audience and critic ratings
                - ViewCount: Total views across platforms
                - Activity: User engagement and interactions
                - Followers: Number of followers
                - TRP: Television Rating Points
                
                If ChaskaMeter ID is not provided, returns the latest period.
                Also returns a list of recent ChaskaMeter periods for navigation.

Retrieves comprehensive show information including:
                - Show details and statistics
                - Story/plot information
                - Channel information
                
                Queries by Title ID only.

Retrieves cast and crew information for a TV show with pagination.
                Includes:
                - Show details
                - Cast members (actors)
                - Crew members (directors, producers, etc.)
                - Person statistics
                
                Results are ordered by cast order number.

Retrieves fanclub members for a TV show with pagination.
                Includes:
                - Show details
                - List of fans with user information
                - Optional: Check if current user is a fan
                
                Results are ordered by join date (most recent first).

post.description:
Submit a ChaskaMeter rating for a TV show.
                Requires authentication.
                Rating must be between 1 and 5.
                
                Validations:
                - User must not be banned
                - User must not be hibernated
                - IP must not be banned
                - User can only vote once per show

get.summary: Get shows by mode (Person, Channel, Category)
get.description:
Retrieves shows filtered by different modes with pagination.
                
                Modes:
                - Person (3): Shows associated with a person (actor, director, etc.)
                - Channel (7): Shows on a specific TV channel
                - Category (0): Shows in a specific category
                
                Archive status:
                - 0: Active shows only
                - 1: Archived shows (excluding locked forums)
                - 2: Archived shows (including locked forums)

Retrieves a paginated list of celebrities with ranking information. 
                Supports filtering by category (Bollywood/Television/Creators) and gender.
                Categories: 1=Bollywood, 2=Television, 3=Creators
                Gender: null=All, 1=Male, 2=Female
Retrieves detailed biography information for a specific celebrity including personal info, statistics, social media, and contributors.
Retrieves a paginated list of fans for a specific celebrity.
Returns paginated list of fan fictions.
Returns a single fan fiction by its identifier.

get.summary: Get fan fiction chapter by ID
get.description: Returns details of a fan fiction chapter by its identifier.

get.summary: Get followers of a fan fiction author
get.description: Returns a list of followers for the specified author.
Returns a paged list of fan fiction authors with user info.
Returns paginated list of quizzes.
Returns quiz details including questions, options, and results.
Returns leaderboard/players for a quiz.
Returns leaderboard of quiz creators.

post.description: Persists the user's quiz answers and returns results, a motivational message, and comparison stats.

get.summary: Get featured banners for home page
get.description: Returns a randomized list of featured articles and videos for the home page. Supports category filtering. **Cached for 5 minutes**.

get.summary: Get filtered articles for home page
get.description: Returns paginated articles filtered by type: all, tv, movies, digital, lifestyle, sports. **Cached for 2 minutes**.

get.summary: Get forum topics for home page
get.description: Returns paginated forum topics filtered by type: ga (global), lt (latest), popular (default). **Cached for 1 minute**.

get.summary: Get channels with shows for home page
get.description: Returns paginated channels with their top shows and thumbnails. **Cached for 10 minutes**.

get.summary: Get latest content for home page
get.description: Returns latest media galleries, web stories, quizzes, videos, movies, and celebrity rankings. **Cached for 3 minutes**.

get.summary: Get online users for home page
get.description: Returns users who visited in the last 20 minutes with privacy statistics. **Cached for 30 seconds**.

get.summary: Get initial home page data (banners + articles)
get.description: **Phase 1: Critical Above-the-Fold**. Returns banners and articles in a single request for fastest time-to-first-content. Fetches both in parallel. **Cached for 2 minutes**.
**Phase 2: Lazy Load on Scroll**. Returns forum topics and channels in a single request. Fetches both in parallel. **Cached for 1 minute**.
**Phase 3: Extended Scroll**. Returns latest galleries, stories, quizzes, videos, movies, and celebrity rankings. **Cached for 3 minutes**.
**Phase 4: Auth-Gated**. Returns online members with privacy statistics. **Requires authentication**. **Cached for 30 seconds**.

get.summary: Get initial category page data (category + banners + articles)
get.description: **Phase 1: Critical Above-the-Fold**. Returns category details, banners, and articles in a single request for fastest time-to-first-content. Supports both category ID and URL path (e.g., 'tv', 'movies'). **Cached for 2 minutes**.

get.summary: Get category content (videos + galleries + web stories)
get.description: **Phase 2: Lazy Load on Scroll**. Returns videos, galleries, and web stories in a single request. Fetches all in parallel. **Cached for 1 minute**.
**Phase 3: Extended Scroll**. Returns movies and shows for categories that support them. **Cached for 3 minutes**.
**Phase 4: Load More**. Returns paginated articles for infinite scroll. **Cached for 2 minutes**.

Global search across articles, movies, shows, celebrities, videos, photos, channels, topics, and users. 
                ContentType: 0=All(Google CSE), 1=Article, 2=Movie, 3=Show, 4=Celebrity, 5=Video, 6=Photo, 7=Channel, 8=Topic, 9=User
Returns search suggestions based on query for autocomplete/typeahead functionality. Searches through previous search history.
Returns currently trending search queries based on search frequency. Useful for displaying popular searches.

get.summary: Get Help Center home page data
get.description: Returns all categories, questions by category, and paginated pending questions.

get.summary: Get Help Center questions with optional filtering
get.description: Returns categories, optional category details, and paginated questions filtered by category or search query.
Returns detailed information for a specific question including answers, categories, and related questions.
Returns paginated list of top contributors based on approved answers.
